name: session-intelligence
description: Session Intelligence — anonymous, in-session personalization with measurable lift.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @si/sdk build && pnpm --filter @si/demo-retailer build && pnpm --filter @si/dashboard build
scripts.cloudflare:deploy:pages: pnpm exec wrangler pages deploy --cwd apps/demo-retailer --branch main --commit-dirty && pnpm exec wrangler pages deploy --cwd apps/dashboard --branch main --commit-dirty
